title: BlazeMon
description: A cobblemon centered modpack that adds lots of food, exploration, building, decoration and technical mods designed by (and for) the BlazeCraft server
body:
![Banner 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9200b5654b9dbd94dfd289a894f5bc5aba48da9_0.webp)
## About This Modpack
This modpack is designed to give you an immersive Minecraft and Cobblemon experience with improved visuals, audio, and environmental sceneries using Shaders, Tectonic, and Seasons. This pack also adds several building, exploration, equipment, QOL, and perfomance improving mods to give you the best experience. The primary focus of this pack is Cobblemon, with many addons to get the most out of the Cobblemon mod, using addons for 200+ pokemon, legendary structures, trainer battles, and a progressive gym leader battle system using Radical Cobblemon Trainers. Designed to give you that nostalgic Pokemon feeling with Vanilla+ features. Designed by the BlazeCraft server.

**This pack's goal is to stay as up to date as possible with the Official Cobblemon Mod. The current version is Cobblemon 1.6. Some mods may end up being removed depending on how up to date those mods are or if they become archived.**

## Features
Cobblemon with many addons that include missing features from the base mod.

Tom's Simple Storage.

Thousands of new building and decoration items with variations for slabs, stairs, walls and vertical slabs :D

200+ new food items using the Delight series.

Several of YUNG's better structure/ dimension mods.

Several mods to help with stability and performance.

Several mods to add immersive sounds, visuals, and biomes.

## Technical Details
Before we begin, it is mandatory you increase your RAM allocation:

- 2GB - No, just No - This WILL crash your game, don't bother.
- 4GB - Minimum - Things will stutter slightly, but on low graphic settings, should be okay.
- 6GB - Recommended - This is the optimum amount of RAM for running medium sized modpacks(~100 mods) to large sized modpacks(200+ mods).
- 10GB - Careful - This much RAM can sometimes be a bad thing for the Java Garbage Collector. Only use this if you are using a heavy terrain generation mod.

## Modpack Contents
This modpack will allow clients to connect to servers that only run Cobblemon and Fabric API.

If you want to get any of these mods for personal use, please download them from their original pages to support their authors.

## **Dependancies:**

**Datapacks:**
- AllTheMons x Mega Showdown
- CobblemonLoot
- Cobblemon - Legendary
- RCT - Cobblemon Pokemon Badges

**Resourcepacks:**
- 3D Crops (enabled by default)
- Motschen's Better Leaves (enabled by default) - Resource pack to make leaves look bushier.
- Box Wallpapers (enabled by default)
- Cobblemon Interface (enabled by default)
- Cobblemon Loading Background (enabled by default)
- E19 Cobblemon Minimap Icons (enabled by default)
- Glow in the dark pokemon (enabled by default)
- Jor's Cobblemon Music Pack (enabled by default)
- Radical Cobblemon Trainers+ (enabled by default)

**Shaderpacks:**
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined (enabled by default) - Recommended shader pack.
